members.name: onFabChange
members.description: Updates the state and DOM representation of a FAB when its configuration changes.

members.name: firstUpdated
members.description:
Lifecycle method called after the first update.
Initializes state from the configuration service and applies initial FAB positions.

members.name: onColorSchemeChange
members.description:
Event handler for color scheme changes.
Updates the UI icon, Material theme variables, and meta theme color.

members.name: onAppConfigsChange
members.description: Syncs the component state with the global application configuration.

members.name: uiModeIcon
members.description: Maps a color scheme name to a Material icon name.

members.name: _handleDialogOpened
members.description: Tracks open dialogs to manage body scroll locking.

members.name: _handleDialogClosed
members.description: Tracks closed dialogs to manage body scroll restoration.

members.name: _onFabMenuItemClick
members.description:
Handles clicks on FAB menu items.
Closes the menu and opens the configuration dialog with the requested content.

return.description: The label string or an empty string if the style is icon-only.

members.name: _getFabLabel
members.description: Generates the label string for a FAB based on its configuration style.

declarations.name: ConfigsDialog
declarations.description:
A comprehensive configuration dialog for managing application settings.
Allows users to toggle dark mode, change color themes, adjust contrast,
and customize Floating Action Button (FAB) behaviors.

members.name: showDialog
members.description: Shows the configuration dialog.

members.name: hideDialog
members.description: Hides the configuration dialog.

declarations.name: ConnectDialog
declarations.description:
A dialog component that provides various contact methods and social links.
It features collapsible sections for different connection categories.

members.name: showDialog
members.description: Shows the connect dialog and applies a custom border to the internal container.

cssProperties.name: --connect-dialog-content-transition
cssProperties.description: The animation duration for expanding/collapsing connection details.

A versatile confirmation dialog used to verify user intent before performing
significant actions like resetting settings.

members.name: dialogContentString
members.description: The text content to display in the dialog body.

members.name: showDialog
members.description: Shows the step-up confirmation dialog.

icons

declarations.name: FabMenu
declarations.description: A floating action button that toggles a menu of actions.

members.name: open
members.description: Whether the menu is currently open.

members.name: openedIcon
members.description:
The icon to display when the menu is open.
Defaults to 'close'.

members.name: variant
members.description:
The variant of the FAB.
Can be 'surface', 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.
Defaults to 'primary'.

members.name: size
members.description:
The size of the FAB.
Can be 'small', 'medium', or 'large'.
Defaults to 'medium'.

members.name: label
members.description:
The label of the underlying {@link MdFab}.
Defaults to an empty string.

members.name: ariaLabel
members.description: The `aria-label` of the FAB.

members.name: direction
members.description: The direction in which the menu items should expand.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the menu is currently open.

attributes.name: opened-icon
attributes.description:
The icon to display when the menu is open.
Defaults to 'close'.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
The variant of the FAB.
Can be 'surface', 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.
Defaults to 'primary'.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
The size of the FAB.
Can be 'small', 'medium', or 'large'.
Defaults to 'medium'.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
The label of the underlying {@link MdFab}.
Defaults to an empty string.

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: The `aria-label` of the FAB.

attributes.name: direction
attributes.description: The direction in which the menu items should expand.

slots.name: menu-items
slots.description: The content of the menu, typically `fab-menu-item` elements.

cssProperties.name: --fab-menu-transition-duration
cssProperties.description: The duration of the menu's opening and closing animations.

declarations.name: NavComponent
declarations.description: A navigation component that renders primary tabs synchronized with the application's URL hash routes.

cssProperties.name: --nav-component-icon-animation
cssProperties.description: The duration of the icon's fill and color transition.

cssProperties.name: --nav-component-icon-animation-reduced
cssProperties.description: The duration of the icon's transition when motion is reduced.

declarations.name: PartialHeader
declarations.description: A header component used for section titles with support for primary, secondary, and tertiary Material color variants.

members.name: headingText
members.description: The text to display within the header.

members.name: headerType
members.description:
The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

attributes.name: heading-text
attributes.description: The text to display within the header.

attributes.name: header-type
attributes.description:
The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

members.name: sectionTitle
members.description:
The title displayed in the section's header.
Maps to the `section-title` attribute.

attributes.name: section-title
attributes.description:
The title displayed in the section's header.
Maps to the `section-title` attribute.

declarations.name: WordCloud
declarations.description: A component that renders a cloud of words with various sorting and grouping options.

members.name: words
members.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

members.name: instantClear
members.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

members.name: appearance
members.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

members.name: grouping
members.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

members.name: sorting
members.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

members.name: delay
members.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

members.name: threshold
members.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

attributes.name: words
attributes.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

attributes.name: instant-clear
attributes.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

attributes.name: grouping
attributes.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

attributes.name: sorting
attributes.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

attributes.name: threshold
attributes.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-animation
cssProperties.description: Duration of the entrance animation for each word.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-animation-reduced
cssProperties.description: Duration of the entrance animation when prefers-reduced-motion is active.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the first weight quartile (highest weight).

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the first weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the second weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the second weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the third weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the third weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the fourth weight quartile (lowest weight).

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the fourth weight quartile.
